dialogBottom.slogan: 300K AI Developers Hub, Great Tech, Great Projects
dialogBottom.responsibilityContent: Developers must ensure that the technical services provided comply with relevant laws and regulations, and shall not provide illegal or non-compliant technical support.
dialogBottom.ipContent: Developers must respect intellectual property rights and shall not infringe others legitimate rights including patents, copyrights, trademarks, etc.
dialogBottom.tradeContent: Transactions between developers and demanders shall follow the principles of fairness, justice, and integrity, ensuring transparency in the transaction process.
dialogBottom.privacyContent: Developers must strictly protect user privacy and shall not disclose, sell, or illegally use personal user information.
dialogBottom.standardContent: Developers must provide technical services that meet industry standards, ensuring the feasibility and reliability of technical solutions.
